Story.problemLead: For a family living with CMPA, a trip to the supermarket isn't a simple task: it's a minefield.
Story.problemBody: Reading every label, searching for hidden derivatives like caseinates or whey, and deciphering 'may contain' warnings takes time and builds anxiety. One mistake can mean a severe allergic reaction.
Story.solutionLead: SafeBite turns doubt into certainty in less than a second.
Story.solutionBody: Our offline scanning technology instantly identifies hidden dangers. No internet required, no complications, straight to the point.
Story.step1Desc: Point your camera at the ingredients list.
Story.step2Desc: Our offline AI searches for traces and derivatives.
Story.step3Desc: Shop with the peace of mind of a clear answer.

Scenarios.title: Real World Situations
Scenarios.case1Desc: Did you know 'sodium caseinate' is milk? SafeBite detects it instantly even if the manufacturer doesn't highlight it.
Scenarios.case2Desc: When someone else is cooking, SafeBite helps quickly verify pantry ingredients to avoid scares.
Scenarios.case3Desc: Many supermarkets are 'dead zones'. SafeBite works 100% offline, always available.

Features.ocrDesc: Point your camera at any label and get an immediate response regarding product safety.
Features.offlineDesc: All intelligence happens on your phone. Works in basements and supermarkets with no signal.
Features.dairyDesc: Specialized algorithms to detect hidden dairy derivatives like casein, whey, and traces.
Features.historyDesc: Save your favorite products and keep a record of your scans for quick reference.

HomePage.title: SafeBite
HomePage.headline: Your Instant Milk Allergy Shield
HomePage.subheadline: Scan food labels in a second. Detect hidden dairy, shop with confidence, and keep your baby safe. 100% Offline.

Support.title: Support
Support.intro: Need help with SafeBite? We are here to listen.

AgeRating.title: Age Rating
AgeRating.intro: SafeBite adheres to the safety and health guidelines of each platform to ensure a safe experience for families.
AgeRating.appleDetail: Rated 13+ due to the nature of health and medical information related to CMPA allergies. This ensures content is used responsibly by adults managing dietary safety.
AgeRating.androidDetail: Rated 3+ (minimum possible) for general safety, although its target audience is adults (18+) responsible for household health and allergy management.

Credits.title: Credits
Credits.body: SafeBite is a creation of Aldhair Vera, developed with passion by the team at FatCat Game Studio. Special thanks to the community for helping identify ingredients and improving safety for everyone.

InfoSection.aplvDescription: It's an exaggerated immune system reaction to cow's milk proteins (Casein and Whey). It's not the same as lactose intolerance.
InfoSection.ingredientsBody:
• Cow's milk (in all forms)
• Casein and Caseinates
• Whey
• Lactose (may contain traces)
• Cream, Butter, Cheese, Yogurt
• Annatto extract (sometimes contains milk)
InfoSection.shoppingBody:
• ALWAYS read the label, even if you already know the product.
• Look for the phrase 'Contains: Milk' at the bottom of the list.
• Beware of cross-contamination ('May contain...', 'Processed on equipment...').
• Prefer foods with certified 'Vegan' or 'Dairy-Free' seals.
InfoSection.resourcesBody:
• Substitutes: Almond, soy, rice, oat milk.
• Calcium: Broccoli, spinach, almonds, fortified tofu.
• For cooking: Use coconut oil or vegetable margarine instead of butter.
InfoSection.symptomsBody:
• Difficulty breathing / wheezing
• Swelling of tongue or throat
• Faintness or severe dizziness

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At SafeBite, we value your privacy and the security of your information. This policy describes how we handle your data in our mobile application.
Privacy.designBody: SafeBite's core feature is its ability to process information locally. Label scanning (OCR) is performed entirely on your device. Your images are never sent to our servers or third parties for analysis.
Privacy.collectionBody:
We do not collect personally identifiable information unless you choose to provide it voluntarily.
• Diagnostic Data: Anonymous error logs.
• Usage Data: Anonymous technical information about interactions.
Privacy.cameraBody: SafeBite requests permission to use the camera solely for scanning labels. We do not save photos to your gallery without permission.
Privacy.thirdPartyBody: We use Google ML Kit for local OCR and RevenueCat for subscriptions (uses anonymous IDs).
Privacy.rightsBody: You can clear your history from the app settings.
Privacy.disclaimerBody: SafeBite is an informational tool. It is not a medical device. Always physically verify labels.

Pricing.title: Simple & Transparent
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your family's needs.
Pricing.proFeature2: Save & track scans with product photos

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By using SafeBite, you agree to the following terms.
Terms.usageBody: SafeBite is for personal, non-commercial use to help identify dairy ingredients.
Terms.disclaimerBody: We are NOT responsible for allergic reactions. OCR technology can fail. The user is ultimately responsible for verifying ingredients.
Terms.paymentBody: Premium features are managed through the App Store / Play Store.
Terms.changesBody: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.
